name_en: Top-tier replica exclusive photo📷【Zippy Zip Wallet】 M12680 Pearl White (Embossed)
name_cn:
Top-tier replica exclusive photo📷【Zippy Zip Wallet】 M12680 Pearl White (Embossed)
A 'Wallet・Claire' from the 'LV SKI' series with added luster. The exclusive Azure Frost of the season creates a sophisticated atmosphere. Made with Monogram・Amplant leather, symbolizing the Maison, and decorated with a Monogram・flower charm on the zipper.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 3.5 cm
